metadata.name: Set up a Private Dining Room

description: A VIP guest has requested a private dining experience in a separate room.

nodes.task_description: Book the private dining room in the event management system for the requested date and time.
Work with the guest to create a custom, pre-set menu for their dinner.

expected_outcome.value: A custom menu is created and added to the event order.

nodes.task_description: Create a BEO for the event, assigning a dedicated server and notifying the kitchen of the special menu.

expected_outcome.value: A BEO is created and distributed to ensure flawless execution.
